allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "try { $n = Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host $n.Source } catch { Write-Host ''node not found'' }; try { $m = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host $m.Source } catch { Write-Host ''npm not found'' }")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh pr create --title ""feat\(scout-intel\): rich material chip and deposit marker tooltips"" --body ""## Summary\\n- Task ID: SCOUT-001\\n- Owner: nickd + Claude Sonnet 4.6\\n- Branch: feature/scout-intel-deposit-tooltips\\n\\n## Affected Surfaces\\n- src/apps/scout-intel/SystemMapControls.jsx\\n- src/apps/scout-intel/SystemMap.jsx\\n- TASK_LEDGER.md\\n\\n## Demo Verification\\n- Local: npm run dev with VITE_BYPASS_ACCESS_GATE=true, navigate to /app/scout, hover material chips and deposit markers\\n\\n## Base44 Impact\\n- none"" 2>&1")
